linux-gfx90a.blocked_reason: REVIEW-PASSED at fork 86fbbbe (reviewer APPROVE, full /pr-review). Two fold-in fixes applied on top of the ported 1802a81 and folded into the single curated commit: (1) common/half.hpp -- the hipRTC std-shim block (integral_constant/is_integral/is_signed/numeric_limits/std::isnan|isinf) sub-gated from the shared __CUDACC_RTC__ guard to __HIP_RTC__ only (inert for HIP, removed from the untested NVRTC path), matching the AF_CONSTEXPR precedent; (2) hip/device_manager.cpp compute2cores() returns a neutral per-CU lane count (64) on __HIP_PLATFORM_AMD__ instead of aliasing gfx90a major=9 onto the NVIDIA sm_90 entry (cosmetic; only feeds an AF_TRACE line + a same-arch flops sort). Single-TU compile sanity (device_manager+transpose+jit, embedded JIT half blob regenerated) PASS, exit 0. Full CUDA.* gtest suite GPU-validated on gfx90a (HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2, ctest -R _cuda$ -j1) = 126/132 binaries pass; the entire validatable core is green (hipRTC JIT engine jit 1781/1781, transpose/scan/scan_by_key/fft/reduce incl ragged+by-key/ireduce, cholesky/lu/qr/svd dense, blas 126/127, complex, math all half transcendentals, norm/binary/approx/convolve/medfilt, random/rng_quality, sort/set/dot/reorder/join/moddims/index/assign/lookup, CV ops fast/harris/orb/sift/homography, nearest_neighbour 122/122, hamming, topk 110/110). The 6 residual failures are accepted dispositions, NOT port defects: sparse+sparse_arith+sparse_convert+threading (sparse hipSPARSE scoped deferral -> clean AF_ERR_NOT_SUPPORTED; threading aborts only because it calls af::sparse), confidence_connected (FreeImage/headless build-config; AF_WITH_IMAGEIO=OFF), schar int8-gemm subcase (rocBLAS HIPBLAS_STATUS_NOT_SUPPORTED for 8I->32F library gap). Next: validator real-GPU validation. See notes.md Review 2026-05-31 + Session 3.

linux-gfx1100.blocked_reason: validation-failed: 124/132 PASS (8 failures vs 6 on gfx90a). 2 new failures on gfx1100 ROCm 7.2.1: (1) cholesky_dense cfloat large-matrix subtests -- FP32 precision difference RDNA3 vs MI250X, max error 0.073 > eps 0.05; (2) where cfloat/cdouble -- scan_first<cuFloatComplex,uint,notzero,false,32,true> JIT compile triggers COMGR internal error 'Failing to compile to realloc' on gfx1100, not a port defect but a ROCm/COMGR compiler bug. JIT engine itself works (jit 1781/1781). Static code: roc-obj-ls confirms hipv4-amdgcn-amd-amdhsa--gfx1100. Topk 110/110 x2 deterministic, nearest_neighbour 122/122 x2. Fork untouched (no commit made). Porter needs to analyze and fix the 2 new failures.
